title: Chupa Chups The Best Of Lollipops 3x10 Pack - Assorted Flavours Strawberry Apple Cola Cream - Iconic Lollies Bulk Sweets for Kids Adults Party Sharing - Plus Cheeroo Magnet
features: Iconic Flavours - Enjoy a delicious variety of Chupa Chups The Best of Lollipops flavours, including the delicious Strawberry, Strawberry & Cream, Apple. Chupa Chup treat bag for every taste
Bulk Pack - This pack contains a generous amount of lollipops, perfect for filling up party bags, treat bags or just for sharing with friends and family.

Any Occasion - Whether it's a birthday party, office party, Valentine's day or any special occasion, our bulk sweets pack with lollies is the perfect party mix. The fantastic flavours lolly pops are a crowd pleaser and will surely add fun to any event.
Quality Brand - Enjoy the great taste of Chupa Chups lollies, a brand known for its delicious and high-quality sweets for any age, children and adults
Free Cheeroo Magnet - Each lollipop bulk contains 3X Chupa Chups The Best Of Lollipops, 10 pack each (total 30 lolly pops) plus lovely free Cheeroo Magnet that cheers you up!
description: Product Description The Best Of Your favourite flavours, all in one place! The first 4 most iconic flavours are Strawberry, Strawberry & Cream, Apple and Cola Green Apple Iconic and all times loved tart and juicy green apple taste. Strawberry Iconic and much loved juicy Strawberry taste, classic 12g lollipop. Cola Iconic and much loved refreshing Cola taste, classic 12g lollipop. Strawberry and Cream A blend of most loved juicy sweet strawberry taste with milky cream.
